name: batch_with_anomalies
description: Seven UP pensioners due quarterly disbursement. Five carry famous failure modes. Two are clean. The agent must disburse the clean, block the unsafe, and skip those already paid.

pensioners.name: Sushila Devi
pensioners.anomaly: UIDAI death flag set (FM-01 ghost pensioner)

pensioners.name: Krishna Mishra
pensioners.anomaly: Bank account swapped by DSWO last week, 1/4 approval steps, no notification (FM-03)

pensioners.name: Phoolmati
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapper points to HDFC account, PPO has SBI (FM-06 last-seeded-wins)

pensioners.name: Munni Bai
pensioners.anomaly: Annual life certificate expired 14 months ago (FM-08)

pensioners.name: Hari Prasad
pensioners.anomaly: Already disbursed this quarter (R-07 double-pay test)
